full_text:
Guo Biao
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Biaowas born in Anping. Head of the future Empress Guo’s family. Once wished to divert river to fish but rebuked by cousin. Guo Biao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
